## Risk and integrity review

- Security/privacy impact:

- Rollback plan:

## Validation

<!-- List exact commands and any manual scenarios exercised. -->

- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm format:check`, and `pnpm typecheck` pass.
- [ ] Relevant unit, integration, end-to-end, schema, and build checks pass.
- [ ] Documentation and examples are updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] No secrets, private research data, generated databases, or build artifacts are committed.
- [ ] Dependencies and GitHub Actions are locked in the lockfile or pinned to immutable SHAs.
